channel.title: Posts on terminalcv
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on terminalcv

item.description:
🧵How to get into traditional cybersecurity if you’re just starting?

If you’re new here and want a structured cybersec path, here’s what worked for me and other good security engineers I know :

Step 1 : Getting the basics

👉🏻(If you are new to computer science , i recommend watching this or else directly jump to later parts )

CompTIA A+ Certification Course :- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=87t6P5ZHTP0&list=PLG49S3nxzAnnOmvg5UGVenB_qQgsh01u

Tryhackme: Beginner Level Link - https://tryhackme.com/hacktivities

Security basics - COMPTIA Security+ Certification course
